p034.png.title: Hundred

exercises.name: Hundred
exercises.reps: 10 breath cycles (5 counts exhale, 5 counts inhale)
exercises.notes: Starting in Hundred Prep position; pump arms up and down for 5 counts exhale and 5 counts inhale for 10 breath cycles.

p034.png.raw_text_summary: Hundred exercise intermediate level abdominal work reformer

p036.png.title: Round Back

exercises.name: Round Back
exercises.spring_setting: all springs attached to hold carriage in place
exercises.notes: Sitting upright at front of Short Box, knees bent, feet under foot strap, arms crossed and resting on chest.

p036.png.raw_text_summary: Round Back Short Box Series Intermediate reformer exercise

p035.png.title: Coordination

exercises.name: Coordination
exercises.notes: Starting in Hundred Prep position; exhale lift head/chest, straighten legs forward, open/close legs; inhale bend legs, lower head and chest.

p035.png.raw_text_summary: Coordination exercise on reformer, intermediate level

p033.png.title: Hundred Prep

exercises.name: Hundred Prep
exercises.notes: Lying supine in neutral spine position, legs in tabletop position, arms straight and perpendicular to floor, palms facing forward; Exhale lift head and chest, reach arms down to sides of body parallel to floor.

p033.png.raw_text_summary: Hundred Prep exercise detail, Fundamental level, Abdominal Work

p037.png.title: Flat Back

exercises.name: Flat Back
exercises.notes: Hinge trunk back and forward with hands interlaced behind head, maintaining trunk stabilization.

p037.png.raw_text_summary: Flat Back Short Box Series reformer intermediate abdominal work

p039.png.title: Twist

exercises.name: Twist
exercises.spring_setting: all springs attached to hold carriage in place
exercises.notes: Rotate trunk diagonally back, lift to center alternating sides; Intermediate level.

p039.png.raw_text_summary: Short Box Series Twist exercise on reformer, intermediate level

p038.png.title: Tilt

exercises.name: Tilt
exercises.spring_setting: all springs attached to hold carriage in place
exercises.notes: Arc trunk to one side and lift back to center, alternate sides; maintain co-contraction of abdominals and back extensors.

p038.png.raw_text_summary: Short Box Series Tilt lateral flexion reformer exercise detail

p041.png.raw_text_summary: Teaching notes about series and 5th movement annotation

p040.png.title: Roundabout

exercises.name: Roundabout
exercises.reps: 3 sets only (3셋트만 해도됨); 1 set = both directions once
exercises.spring_setting: all springs attached to hold carriage in place
exercises.notes: Rotate trunk diagonally back, then rotate to opposite side and lift trunk to center; alternate sides.

p040.png.raw_text_summary: Roundabout Short Box Series Reformer Advanced Abdominal Work

p042.png.title: Climb-a-Tree

exercises.name: Climb-a-Tree
exercises.spring_setting: all springs attached to hold carriage in place
exercises.notes: Advanced level; sitting upright at front of Long Box, one foot under foot strap, other leg bent with thigh to chest, holding leg below knee.

p042.png.raw_text_summary: Climb-a-Tree Short Box Series advanced reformer exercise

p045.png.title: Circles Down

exercises.name: Circles Down
exercises.notes: Lying supine in neutral spine, legs straight perpendicular to floor, hips externally rotated, feet in straps plantarflexed; open legs and circle around, lift legs, return to start.

p043.png.title: Climb-a-Tree

exercises.name: Climb-a-Tree
exercises.spring_setting: all springs attached to hold carriage in place
exercises.notes: Sitting upright at front of Long Box, one foot under foot strap, other leg bent with thigh to chest; spinal flexor and extensor control with hamstring stretch.

p043.png.raw_text_summary: Climb-a-Tree Short Box Series Advanced Abdominal Work reformer

p044.png.title: Frog

exercises.name: Frog
exercises.notes: Lying supine in neutral spine, hips externally rotated, feet in straps, dorsiflexed, heels together, hips and knees at 90 degrees; exhale straighten legs, inhale bend and return.

p044.png.raw_text_summary: Frog exercise detail, Hip Supine Series, Fundamental level

p048.png.title: Frog Extended

exercises.name: Frog Extended
exercises.notes: Lying supine in neutral spine, hips externally rotated, feet in straps, dorsiflexed, heels together, hips and knees at 80 degrees.

p047.png.title: Openings

exercises.name: Openings
exercises.notes: Lying supine in neutral spine, legs straight on diagonal, hips externally rotated, feet in straps plantarflexed; inhale open legs, exhale close legs.

p049.png.title: Frog Extended Reverse

exercises.name: Frog Extended Reverse
exercises.notes: Starting in Frog Extended position; hip adductor strength, stretch, and pelvic lumbar stabilization.

p052.png.title: Bottom Lift with Extensions

exercises.name: Bottom Lift with Extensions
exercises.notes: Starting in Bottom Lift position; do not straighten knees completely; keep pelvis lifted during extensions.

p052.png.raw_text_summary: Bottom Lift with Extensions, Intermediate level, Reformer

p050.png.title: Bottom Lift

exercises.name: Bottom Lift
exercises.notes: Lying supine in neutral spine, roll spine up and down articulating through each vertebra.

p053.png.title: Short Spine

exercises.name: Short Spine

p046.png.title: Circles Up

exercises.name: Circles Up
exercises.notes: Exhale open legs out to sides, circle legs around and together; Inhale lift legs, return to start position.

p054.png.title: Short Spine Con't

exercises.name: Short Spine Con't
exercises.notes: Inhale bend knees to Frog, Exhale articulate spine down, Inhale dorsiflex feet roll sacrum to mat and return; Intermediate level.

p056.png.title: Lunge Standing

exercises.name: Lunge Standing
exercises.reps: 2 repetitions per side, 3-5 breaths each position
exercises.notes: Hip flexor and hamstring stretch with pelvis tilts; change sides after 2 repetitions.

p056.png.raw_text_summary: Reformer Lunge Standing hamstring stretch fundamental level

p057.png.title: Lunge Standing

exercises.name: Lunge Standing
exercises.notes: Hip flexor and extensor stretch; bias posterior tilt during hip flexor stretch, anterior tilt during hamstring stretch.

p057.png.raw_text_summary: Lunge Standing reformer stretch fundamental level

p055.png.title: Long Spine

exercises.name: Long Spine
exercises.notes: Lying supine in neutral spine, hips externally rotated, legs straight on diagonal, feet in straps, plantarflexed, headrest down; spinal articulation and hip extensor control focus.

p058.png.title: Lunge Kneeling

exercises.name: Lunge Kneeling
exercises.notes: Kneeling on carriage, one foot on footbar; stretches hip flexors and extensors with breath coordination.

exercises.name: Scooter

exercises.name: Lunge Forward

p108.png.title: Mini Roll-Up

exercises.name: Mini Roll-Up
exercises.notes: Lying supine in neutral spine, perform mini roll-up to chest lift position; focus on spinal flexor strength and pelvic lumbar stabilization.

p108.png.raw_text_summary: Mini Roll-Up Warm-Up Series Reformer Intermediate level

p109.png.title: Mini Roll-Up Oblique

exercises.name: Mini Roll-Up Oblique
exercises.notes: Start in Mini Roll-Up position, one hand holding PTBar, lift to Chest Lift with Rotation; change sides after 5 repetitions.

p109.png.raw_text_summary: Mini Roll-Up Oblique reformer abdominal warm up intermediate

p110.png.title: Roll-Up with PTBar

exercises.name: Roll-Up with PTBar
exercises.notes: Lying supine in neutral spine, roll up to upright sitting position with arms overhead, using PTBar.

p110.png.raw_text_summary: Roll-Up with PTBar, Warm Up Series, Intermediate level

p113.png.title: Circles Up

exercises.name: Circles Up
exercises.notes: Open legs out to sides, then circle legs around and together lifting legs back to start.

p113.png.raw_text_summary: Circles Up reformer Hip Supine Series Fundamental level

p112.png.title: Circles Down

exercises.name: Circles Down
exercises.notes: Lying supine, legs straight, hips externally rotated, feet in straps, plantarflexed; exhale lower legs, inhale circle and return.

p112.png.raw_text_summary: Circles Down Hip Supine Series Fundamental level reformer

p111.png.title: Frog

exercises.name: Frog
exercises.notes: Lying supine in neutral spine, feet in straps dorsiflexed, heels together; exhale straighten legs, inhale return.

p111.png.raw_text_summary: Frog exercise on Hip Supine Series, Fundamental level

p114.png.title: Walking

exercises.name: Walking
exercises.notes: Flutter kick motion lowering and lifting legs; maintain pelvic lumbar stabilization throughout.

p114.png.raw_text_summary: Walking exercise in Hip Supine Series, Fundamental level

exercises.name: Bicycle Reverse
exercises.notes: 대각선 2번 시작하나 발이 지나가기 전에 뻗기

p115.png.title: Bicycle

exercises.name: Bicycle
exercises.reps: 5 cycles each leg, repeat in reverse direction; 3~5 sets
exercises.notes: Create L shape with legs each cycle; keep legs parallel avoiding hip external rotation.

p115.png.raw_text_summary: Bicycle Hip Supine Series reformer fundamental level

p117.png.title: Frog

exercises.name: Frog
exercises.notes: Lying supine, one foot in strap at 90 degrees, other leg straight on mat; exhale straighten, inhale bend.

p117.png.raw_text_summary: Frog exercise from Single Hip Supine Series, Intermediate level

p118.png.title: Circles Down

exercises.name: Circles Down
exercises.notes: Starting in Frog, leg perpendicular to Mat; lower leg on exhale, open and circle around on inhale.

p118.png.raw_text_summary: Circles Down exercise from Single Hip Supine Series

p119.png.title: Circles Up

exercises.name: Circles Up
exercises.notes: Open leg out to side, circle leg around and up; hip extensor strength and pelvic lumbar stabilization focus.

p119.png.raw_text_summary: Circles Up exercise, Single Hip Supine Series, Intermediate level

p120.png.title: Hip Extension

exercises.name: Hip Extension
exercises.notes: Lower leg on exhale, lift leg and return to start on inhale; focus on hip extensor strength and pelvic lumbar stabilization.

p120.png.raw_text_summary: Hip Extension in Single Hip Supine Series, intermediate level

p123.png.title: Tower Prep

exercises.name: Tower Prep
exercises.notes: Roll up onto shoulder girdle bending legs and extending hips; spinal articulation focus.

p123.png.raw_text_summary: Tower Prep spinal articulation fundamental level cadillac exercise

p122.png.title: Monkey

exercises.name: Monkey
exercises.notes: Lying supine, roll up straightening legs, then roll down bending legs; focuses on spinal flexors and extensors.

p122.png.raw_text_summary: Monkey exercise on cadillac, spinal articulation, fundamental level

p121.png.title: Bicycle

exercises.name: Bicycle
exercises.notes: Starting in Circles Down position; reverse direction after 5 complete cycles.

p121.png.raw_text_summary: Bicycle exercise in Single Hip Supine Series, intermediate level

p124.png.title: Sitting Forward

exercises.name: Sitting Forward
exercises.notes: Round trunk into C curve leaning back, press bar down, transfer trunk forward, then straighten trunk.

p124.png.raw_text_summary: Sitting Forward reformer full body integration intermediate level

p128.png.title: BASI Pilates Contact Page
p128.png.raw_text_summary: BASI Pilates logo and contact information page

p125.png.title: Side Reach

exercises.name: Side Reach
exercises.notes: Starting in Sitting Forward position; exhale round into C curve leaning back, inhale release one hand reach back palm facing up, exhale return hand to PTBar, inhale straighten trunk sit upright.

p125.png.raw_text_summary: Side Reach reformer full body integration intermediate level
